items.title: The memory chip crunch is paying off for this US company
items.description: Revenue quadrupled to $41.45 billion compared with the same period a year ago. The company's profit, meanwhile, rose from $1.88 billion to an incredible $28.2 billion year-over-year.

items.title: New website names and shames companies that still don’t offer passkeys to users

items.title: The emergence of the web data infrastructure layer for AI
items.description: AI is booming. New use cases are emerging each day. To capitalize on the technology’s potential, enterprises require data at scale. items.title: Google DeepMind is worried about what happens when millions of agents start to interact
